home.title: Zempar
home.eyebrow: When search moves to ChatGPT, Gemini & Perplexity
home.subtitle: Found in the answers
home.description: People increasingly ask ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity—not just Google. Classic SEO still matters for crawlability and authority, but Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) shapes whether you are cited, summarized, and recommended in AI answers. Zempar helps companies strengthen how they appear across LLM applications.

featureCards.title: LLM visibility audit
featureCards.description: See how your brand shows up in generative answers today—gaps, risks, and quick wins versus competitors.

featureCards.title: Authority & entity signals
featureCards.description: Align messaging, facts, and structured data so models can ground accurate, citable summaries.

featureCards.title: Technical & citation readiness
featureCards.description: Improve crawlability, schema, and source quality so search engines and retrieval pipelines can trust your content.

featureCards.title: Measure and iterate
featureCards.description: Track prompts, citations, and narrative drift—then refine content and positioning with evidence.

hero.title: Generative Engine Optimization
hero.description: Zempar pairs SEO fundamentals with GEO—clear entities, trustworthy content, and technical signals—so your organization is represented fairly when models surface recommendations.

missionSection.title: Why GEO now
missionSection.body: The buyer journey is splitting: traditional search still drives traffic, but many decisions start inside AI assistants. We help you protect accuracy, earn citations, and stay visible as answers replace blue links—without abandoning the SEO foundation your site still needs.

innovation.title: LLM discovery lens
innovation.description: We map how your category, products, and claims appear in generative surfaces—not only rankings on a SERP.

partnership.title: Partnership, not checklists
partnership.description: We work with marketing, comms, and web teams to prioritize the narratives and proof points models are likely to reuse.

excellence.title: Credible, citable content
excellence.description: We stress-test clarity, consistency, and sourcing so AI summaries reflect you accurately—not a distorted third-party snippet.

reliability.title: Ongoing GEO hygiene
reliability.description: Models and sources change; we help you monitor drift, fix misstatements, and keep structured signals up to date.

howItWorks.title: How Zempar advances your GEO
howItWorks.subtitle: From baseline to iteration—strategy, implementation, and measurement so you improve visibility inside LLM experiences while keeping SEO strong.

aiChat.title: Baseline & gap analysis
aiChat.description: We capture how you appear across major LLM apps and traditional search for priority topics—then prioritize fixes by impact and effort.

knowledgeBase.title: Content & entity strategy
knowledgeBase.description: We refine messaging, on-page structure, FAQs, and entity-level facts so answers have trustworthy material to cite.

multilingual.title: Implementation across surfaces
multilingual.description: We align your site, docs, and structured data with GEO goals—including multilingual and regional variants where you operate.

learning.title: Monitor, test, refine
learning.description: We track how narratives shift over time, validate changes with prompt sets, and tighten the loop as models and sources evolve.

aiVisibility.title: Why AI visibility matters for your business
aiVisibility.subtitle: Discovery is shifting toward AI assistants and answer engines—not only traditional search.
queries: Best-rated accounting firms for small business near me
Reliable B2B SaaS for inventory and forecasting
Top vegan restaurants in Chicago with outdoor seating
aiVisibility.body: Large language models recommend businesses based on how clearly you are represented across the web: facts, structure, reviews, authoritative sources, and how easily your positioning can be summarized. If models cannot confidently ground an answer about you, they may omit you—or repeat inaccurate third-party snippets.
aiVisibility.closing: Zempar helps organizations of every size understand and improve how they show up in this emerging discovery channel, alongside classic SEO.

seoGeo.title: SEO vs GEO: what’s the difference?
seoGeo.subtitle: Traditional SEO helps buyers find you through clickable links. Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) shapes whether AI platforms mention you directly in their answers—with accurate context and citations.

seo.label: SEO
seo.mainGoal: Rank higher on search engine results pages for high-intent queries.
seo.howFindHighlight: Through clickable links and listings on the search results page.
optimizes: Website content, information architecture, and keyword targeting
Credibility signals such as reviews, backlinks, and brand mentions
Consistent business information across directories and the open web
SEO and GEO comparison: how search rankings relate to how models describe your category
seo.influencesHighlight: Traffic and leads that arrive directly from search results to your site or listings.
seo.whyMatters: Helps buyers discover your business when they already know what they are looking for.

geo.label: GEO
geo.mainGoal: Be included accurately in AI-generated answers and recommendations.
geo.howFindHighlight: Mentioned or summarized directly inside the assistant’s response—not only as a link list.
optimizes: Content clarity and structure so LLMs can extract and cite facts fairly
Positioning across AI surfaces (e.g. ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity) and the sources they rely on
Authority and consistency signals that affect how models interpret your brand
SEO and GEO comparison: where search strength supports—or diverges from—AI narratives
geo.influencesHighlight: Direct mentions, shortlists, and recommendations inside assistants your customers already trust.
geo.whyMatters: Helps buyers trust and choose your business when decisions start in conversation—not on a SERP.

visibilityOfferings.title: How businesses work with Zempar on AI visibility
visibilityOfferings.subtitle: Choose a focused audit or an ongoing partnership. Both combine SEO fundamentals with GEO so you are findable in search and fairly represented in AI answers.

audit.tagline: Baseline clarity, competitors, and a prioritized roadmap
audit.description: A structured assessment of how your brand appears in generative answers and traditional search for your priority topics—delivered as a written report you can act on internally or with your agency.
features: AI visibility analysis across representative prompts and topics
Competitor and category comparison (who models favor and why)
Ranking and SERP context where it affects discovery
SEO and GEO comparison for your site and key landing pages
Concrete recommendations: content, entities, structured data, and source hygiene
audit.bestFor: Teams that want an evidence-based snapshot before committing to a broader program.

growth.title: AI visibility growth partnership
growth.tagline: Execution, measurement, and iteration with Zempar alongside your team
growth.description: We work as an extension of marketing, comms, and web—implementing changes, monitoring narratives, and refining as models and sources evolve.
growth.plusLabel: Everything in the AI visibility audit, plus:
features: Hands-on content, FAQ, and entity alignment for citable answers
Technical and schema guidance coordinated with your developers or agency
Prompt-based monitoring and narrative drift detection over time
Regular reviews and backlog grooming tied to business outcomes
Ongoing SEO and GEO comparison reporting as the landscape shifts
growth.bestFor: Organizations that want sustained improvement—not a one-off PDF.

seoGeoBoth.title: The winning strategy? Both.
seoGeoBoth.subtitle: SEO helps customers find you. GEO helps them choose you with accurate, trustworthy context.
seoGeoBoth.body: Our methodology combines both: strong search fundamentals plus generative visibility—so you cover the full journey from discovery to conversion, no matter your industry.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common questions about Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), SEO, and how Zempar helps

questions.question: What is Zempar?
questions.answer: Zempar is a partner for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) and modern search visibility. We help organizations improve how they are represented, cited, and summarized inside LLM applications such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity—while keeping classic SEO foundations strong.

questions.question: What is GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)?
questions.answer: GEO is the practice of improving how your brand, products, and claims show up inside AI-generated answers—not only traditional search result pages. It focuses on accurate representation, trustworthy sources, structured signals, and content that models and retrieval systems can reuse fairly.

questions.question: How is GEO different from SEO?
questions.answer: SEO optimizes for ranking and discovery in search engines. GEO optimizes for inclusion and accuracy when users ask large language models for recommendations or summaries. Both matter: solid SEO usually helps GEO because crawlers, authority, and clear content still feed many AI experiences—but GEO adds a lens on narratives, citations, and how answers are composed.

questions.question: How do I get started with Zempar?
questions.answer: Contact us with your priority markets, products, and topics. We typically begin with a baseline of how you appear in both search and major LLM surfaces, then agree on a roadmap spanning content, technical signals, and measurement. Engagements are flexible for startups and global teams.

questions.question: What do you deliver in a GEO engagement?
questions.answer: Deliverables vary by scope but often include audits, content and entity recommendations, structured data and site guidance, prompt-based monitoring, and a refinement cadence. We do not guarantee placement inside proprietary models—we improve the inputs and signals that make fair, citable representation more likely.

questions.question: Do you support multiple languages?
questions.answer: Yes. GEO and SEO both need consistent facts and tone across locales. We can align English, Arabic, and other languages so generative answers stay coherent for each market you serve.

questions.question: How secure is my data with Zempar?
questions.answer: We treat your materials and strategy as confidential. We use enterprise-grade practices for access and handling of client information. Details are covered under contract and we do not reuse your proprietary content for other clients.

questions.question: Do I need technical expertise on our side?
questions.answer: No. We work with marketing, communications, and web teams. We explain technical recommendations in plain language and coordinate with your developers or agency when implementation is needed.
